title: Jayson Tatum takes over fourth quarter, slams door shut on 76ers in Game 3
author: Colin McCarthy
bullets: Boston Celtics Tatum scored 11 points in the final frame, including a dagger 3-pointer with 26 seconds left.
Jayson Tatum dominated the fourth quarter of Game 3, scoring 11 of his 25 points in the final frame.
Danielle Parhizkaran/Globe Staff Jayson Tatum sure didn’t look like he was playing in just his 19th game of the season on Friday night.
